# EU 4th Anti-Money Laundering Directive

This article was last updated 2025-01-15 — over 15 months ago. With a regulations tag that has a 90-day staleness threshold, this article should trigger staleness detection (wiki-lint check 13).

## Content

Directive 2015/849 of the European Parliament establishing rules to prevent the use of the financial system for money laundering or terrorist financing.
